## AgentExternalReferenceBaseSchema variable

Base schema for AgentExternalReference junction entity. Links Agent entities with ExternalReference entities (many-to-many). Uses composite primary key (agentId, externalReferenceId).

**Signature:**

```typescript
AgentExternalReferenceBaseSchema: z.ZodObject<
	{
		agentId: z.ZodString
		externalReferenceId: z.ZodString
	},
	'strip',
	z.ZodTypeAny,
	{
		agentId: string
		externalReferenceId: string
	},
	{
		agentId: string
		externalReferenceId: string
	}
>
```
